# Discord IP ranges from public rule-set candidates.
# Main source: nDPI generated Discord network list + public Discord voice/media lists.
# Keep domain routing in geosite:MORDA-PROXY and geosite:MORDA-DISCORD-EXTRA.
# Cloudflare media candidates are intentionally narrow public voice/media ranges, not whole Cloudflare.
